articles.title: Yen Rebound Ebbs After Brief Rally on Outlook for BOJ Rate Hikes

articles.summary: The yen slid beyond 163 per dollar for the first time since 1986 before recovering some ground in choppy trading on the prospect of faster interest-rate hikes from the Bank of Japan.
